zh.Urgel, Lérida, Catalunya, España: 西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達
zh.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor是Fernando García de Villamayor和Maria Ponce De Minerva的女兒，於1096年出生在西班牙。她於1119年與Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon在西班牙結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1152年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.Urgel, Lérida, Catalunya, España: 西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達
zh-hans.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor是Fernando García de Villamayor和Maria Ponce De Minerva的女儿，于1096年出生在西班牙。她于1119年与Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon在西班牙结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1152年在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Mario, Raul, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Joao, Paulo, Catarina, Albeiro, Ligia, Godofredo, Lidio, Wenseslao, Adao, Afonso.

Spanish (García) and Portuguese: from a medieval personal name of uncertain origin. It is normally found in medieval records in the Latin form Garsea, and may well be of pre-Roman origin, perhaps akin to Basque (h)artz ‘bear’. This is the most common surname in Spain and also one of the most common surnames elsewhere in Spanish-speaking world. In the US, where it is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos in NM), it is the sixth most frequent surname. Compare De Garcia .

variants.name: Grassia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Amedeo, Maurizio, Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore.
Italian: from a metathesized form of the personal nameGarsia, from Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Arcia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Francisco, Arturo, Dagoberto, Enrique, Jose, Ramiro, Adalberto, Aleida, Alejandro, Alfredo, Amalia.
Hispanic: probably an altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garcie
meanings: Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of Spanish García (see Garcia ). This form of the surname of Spanish origin is also found in southern France.
Spanish (Ávila): variant of García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garcilazo
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): altered form of Spanish (Valencia) Garcilaso, a compound of the personal name Garci (a short form of García, see Garcia ) and the nickname laso ‘weak, exhausted’.

variants.name: Gacia
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garsia
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of   Garcia  .

variants.name: Gracia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Jesus, Luis, Guadalupe, Mario, Pedro, Javier, Jorge.

Spanish; Catalan (Gràcia): from a short form of the Christian religious epithet de la Gracia, meaning ‘of mercy’ and forming part of the Marian name Maria de la Gracia ‘(Holy) Mary of Grace’, from Spanish gracia, Catalan gràcia ‘grace, mercy’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of Spanish García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: De Garcia
meanings: Spanish and Galician (De García); Portuguese: patronymic from Spanish and Galician García and Portuguese Garcia , with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Garces
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Carlos, Juan, Jose, Manuel, Cesar, Rafael, Luis, Fernando, Gustavo, Javier, Mario.  Portuguese Albeiro, Paulo.
Spanish; Catalan (Garcés); Portuguese (Garcês): patronymic from the personal name García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garzia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Mario, Alfredo, Ernestina, Fernando, Juan, Pedro, Ricardo.  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Ciro, Corrado.
Italianized form of Spanish   Garcia  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor was born in 1096, in Spain as the daughter of Fernando García de Villamayor and Maria Ponce De Minerva. She married Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon in 1119, in Spain. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1152, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor est née en 1096, à Espagne, fille de Fernando García de Villamayor et Maria Ponce De Minerva. Elle a épousé Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon en 1119, à Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1152, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor wurde 1096 in Spanien, als Tochter von Fernando García de Villamayor und Maria Ponce De Minerva geboren. Sie hat 1119 in Spanien Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1152 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor è nata il nel 1096 nel Spagna come figlia di Fernando García de Villamayor e Maria Ponce De Minerva. Lei sposato Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon nel 1119, nel Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1152, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Urgel, Lérida, Catalunya, España: スペインカタルニーアレイダ
ja.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayorは1096年にスペインでFernando García de VillamayorとMaria Ponce De Minervaの娘として生まれた。1119年にスペインでPedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1152年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor(은)는 1096년 스페인에서 Fernando García de Villamayor(와)과 Maria Ponce De Minerva의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1119년 스페인에서 Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1152년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor nasceu em 1096, em Espanha filha de Fernando García de Villamayor e Maria Ponce De Minerva. Ela casou-se com Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon em 1119, em Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1152, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor родилась в 1096 г. в местности Испания. Её родителей звали Fernando García de Villamayor и Maria Ponce De Minerva. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon в 1119 г. в местности Испания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1152 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: María García de Villamayor nació en 1096, en España como hija de Fernando García de Villamayor y Maria Ponce De Minerva. Se casó con Pedro Ordoñes  García de Aza de Roa y Ayllon en 1119, en España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1152, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
